import React, { ReactElement } from "react"; import Lottie from "react-lottie"; interface Props { resume: string; } const defaultOptions = { loop: true, autoplay: true, animationData: "/animations/coding_man", rendererSettings: { preserveAspectRatio: "xMidYMid slice", }, }; export default function Home({ resume }: Props): ReactElement { return (

Hello!

I am Akhil Kala,

A full stack Web Developer.

View Resume
); }
